scripts.mcp: npm run build && node dist/stratosphere.js mcp
scripts.doctor: npm run build && node dist/stratosphere.js doctor
scripts.build:binary:linux-x64: npm run build && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/stratosphere.js --target node20-linux-x64 --output ../../release/stratosphere-linux-x64
scripts.build:binary:linux-arm64: npm run build && npx @yao-pkg/pkg dist/stratosphere.js --target node20-linux-arm64 --output ../../release/stratosphere-linux-arm64
scripts.build:binary: npm run build:binary:linux-x64 && npm run build:binary:linux-arm64 && (cd ../../release && shasum -a 256 stratosphere-linux-* > SHA256SUMS)
